title: lycopodium phlegmaria var. australe
intro: Lycopodium phlegmaria var. australe, also known as Australian lycopodium, is a species of club moss that belongs to the Lycopodiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Australian lycopodium include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal remedies such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to potential interactions and side effects.
